# Summer 2027 Plan (auto-generated)
Generated: 2026-07-19
Laidlaw LiA assumed: 2027-06-15 → 2027-07-26

## Strategy
1. Lock exact LiA dates with HKU Horizons in writing.
2. Prioritise Dec 2026–Feb 2027 and winter law schemes (Cleary, Reed Smith, SFC, Jane Street, Flow Traders, Jump).
3. Use Summer 2027 full-time law VS only if: (a) you are eligibility-penultimate, AND (b) firm can place you outside LiA weeks, OR (c) LiA is scheduled in a non-overlapping block.
4. Do ONE deep placement + LiA — not three logos.
5. Parallel: AIIFL fellowship + LITE + one depth artifact.

## Laidlaw-compatible / bridge
- **Reed Smith** — Winter Vacation Scheme 2026/27 (priority=critical, close=2026-10-31, LIA=none)  
  https://www.reedsmith.com/join-us/asia/hong-kong/
  - Laidlaw-compatible winter timing.
- **Cleary Gottlieb** — Winter Vacation Scheme 2026/27 (priority=critical, close=2026-10-01, LIA=none)  
  https://www.clearygottlieb.com/locations/hong-kong/legal-landing-page/vacation-schemes
- **Jane Street** — HK Quantitative Trader / QR / SWE Internships (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/internships/
  - BEST Laidlaw-compatible quant timing. Apply rolling now.
- **Optiver** — FutureFocus Singapore Trading & Research (priority=critical, close=2026-07-31, LIA=none)  
  https://www.optiver.com/join-us/jobs/institutional-sales-and-trading/singapore/futurefocus-singapore-trading-and-research/
  - DEADLINE 31 Jul 2026 — apply immediately if eligible. Can lead to 2027 internship offer.
- **Flow Traders** — Trading Intern Hong Kong (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.flowtraders.com/careers/job-description/7100637
  - Dec-Jan batch Laidlaw-compatible; also Jun-Aug batch conflicts.
- **Jump Trading** — Campus QR / Trader / SWE (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.jumptrading.com/hr/students-new-grads
  - Watch Dec-Feb APAC roles.
- **SFC** — Winter Internship Programme (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.sfc.hk/en/Career/Why-the-SFC/Join-us-as-an-Intern/Summer-and-Winter-Internship-Programme
- **HKU AIIFL** — Undergraduate Student Fellows (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://aiifl.law.hku.hk/people/under-graduate-student-fellows/
  - Apply now with CV + 1-page statement. Flexible; builds Year-1 signal.
- **HKU LITE Lab** — Course / paid RA / project placements (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://litelab.law.hku.hk/students/courses/
- **Jane Street** — QTC / FTTP / INSIGHT (monitor) (priority=critical, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/programs-and-events/
  - QTC especially strong for game-theory profile. Monitor rolling.
- **FSTB / Cyberport** — GBA Fintech Two-way Internship Scheme (priority=high, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://www.fstb.gov.hk/fsb/en/business/funding_schemes/GbaFintechTwoWayInternshipSchemeForPostSecondaryStudents.html
  - Prefer winter batch over summer to avoid LiA.
- **Herbert Smith Freehills Kramer** — First Year Workshop (priority=high, close=None, LIA=none)  
  https://careers.hsfkramer.com/global/en/hong-kong/early-careers/first-year

  https://www.sullcrom.com/Careers/Hong-Kong-Trainee-Solicitors-Program

  https://betatron.co/venture-capital-intern
  - Part-time/flexible possible — schedule around LiA.
